metadata.description: Unified Galaxy HI Rotation Curve Corpus v6.0. Surveys: SPARC/175 (Lelli et al. 2016, AJ 152 157), THINGS/34 (Walter et al. 2008, AJ 136 2563; de Blok et al. 2008, AJ 136 2648), LITTLE THINGS/26 (Oh et al. 2015, AJ 149 180), WALLABY DR2/203 (Deg et al. 2022; Murugeshan et al. 2024). Kinematic parameters (inc, distance, PA, Vsys) verified against scanned primary tables. SPARC RA/Dec/Vsys/PA not available in a unified published table.

quality_tiers.1: Hand-curated, published rotation curves with uncertainties

metadata.citation: Flynn, D.C. (2026). Unified Galaxy Rotation Curve Corpus v6.0. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19425428

provenance.SPARC: inc/distance from Lelli et al. 2016 Table 1 (scanned MRT); RC data from SPARC website
provenance.THINGS: kinematic params from de Blok et al. 2008 Table 2 (scanned); coordinates from Walter et al. 2008 Table 1
provenance.LITTLE_THINGS: all params from Oh et al. 2015 Table 1 (scanned); verified against published snippet
provenance.WALLABY: ingested from CADC 3DBarolo DR2 model files via wallaby_ingest.py
provenance.note: SPARC ra_deg/dec_deg/vsys_kms/pa_deg absent — not published in a unified table; distributed across ~50 individual source papers

known_issues: Vgas can be negative (thermal pressure) - use sign(Vgas)*Vgas^2 in quadrature
Vdisk/Vbul normalized to Upsilon=1 - apply mass-to-light ratio before use

Vbul.description: Bulge rotation at Upsilon=1. Zero for bulgeless galaxies.
